login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: Use your university Google account to sign in. Only authorised university emails are permitted.
login.no_role: Your account has no role assigned. Please contact the administrator.
login.google_failed: Could not authenticate with Google. Please try again.
login.domain_not_allowed: Your email domain is not allowed to sign in.
login.account_disabled: Your account is disabled. Please contact the administrator.
login.not_registered: Your account is not registered in the evaluation system. Contact your Quality College Coordinator.
common.name: Name
common.subject: Subject
enums.form_target.head: Head of Department
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.progress_hint: Open evaluation period and committee data is required to compute progress.
colleges.title: Colleges
departments.title: Departments
staff.title: Staff Members
staff.import_help_1: Use the CSV template columns exactly as listed. Institutional e-mail must use an allowed university domain.
staff.import_help_2: Employee type, qualification, academic title, position, and status must match values configured under Staff Field Options.
staff.import_help_3: For Kurdish names, use the downloaded template or save your spreadsheet as CSV UTF-8 (Excel: Save As → CSV UTF-8).
staff.import_help_4: Position Dean or Head of Department automatically assigns organizational roles (editable under Organizational Roles).
staff.purge_body: All staff records will be removed permanently, including soft-deleted rows. Related evaluations will be deleted. Dean / Head assignments will be cleared. User accounts are kept but unlinked from staff.
staff.purge_confirm_label: Type DELETE ALL STAFF to confirm
staff.colleagues_hint: Colleagues are added to :department and linked to existing local evaluation committees when marked as teaching staff.
staff.not_linked: Not linked yet (will link automatically on first Google login)
staff_options.title: Staff Field Options
staff_options.intro: Configure allowed values for staff forms and CSV import. Inactive values cannot be selected for new staff or imports.
coordinators.title: Quality College Coordinators
coordinators.google_hint: User signs in via Google with this email.
coordinators.confirm_remove: Remove coordinator role from this user?
users.title: Users
super_admins.title: Super Admins
super_admins.intro: Super Admins sign in with Google using their university email. No password is required.
super_admins.email_readonly: Email cannot be changed after creation. User signs in via Google.
super_admins.email_hint: User will sign in via Google with this email (@uoz.edu.krd or @staff.uoz.edu.krd).
super_admins.confirm_remove: Remove Super Admin role from this user?
super_admin_evaluations.title: Super Admin Evaluations
super_admin_evaluations.intro: Institutional evaluations assigned to Super Admin. Any Super Admin may complete each staff member once.
super_admin_evaluations.empty: No Super Admin evaluations for this period.
super_admin_evaluations.closed_period_no: This evaluation period is closed for other users, but Super Admins may still complete these evaluations.
super_admin_evaluations.zip_no_staff: No staff evaluation data found for this period.
super_admin_evaluations.zip_create_faile: Could not create the ZIP archive.
committees.title: Committees
committees.confirm_delete: Delete this committee and all its evaluations?
committees.no_college: You don't have a college assigned. Please ask the Super Admin to assign you to a college from the Coordinators page.
committees.local_members_help: Required: 1 member from the chosen department, 1 from another department (not the Head of Department). You (the coordinator) and the department head are added automatically. Type in the box to search by name.
committees.local_head_auto: Head of Department is added automatically when assigned on the Organizational Roles page.
committees.hd_members_help: Required: Dean and Quality College Coordinator are added automatically. Choose one member from the selected department and one from the college (may be the same department).
committees.same_dept_hint: One staff member from the chosen department.
committees.other_dept_hint: Staff member from a different department of :college.
committees.college_member_hint: Any staff member in :college (including the same department).
committees.university_wide_hint: All university staff are listed for the external committee member.
committees.other_member_different_depart: The other member must be from a different department in the same college.
committees.other_member_same_college: The other member must belong to the same college.
evaluations.title: Evaluations
evaluations.super_admin_edit_notice: Super Admin: You are editing a submitted evaluation. Changes are saved immediately and remain marked as submitted.
evaluations.no_visible_questions: No questions are visible to your role on this form.
evaluations.submit_confirm_body: After submission, you will not be able to edit your answers.
evaluations.question: Question
forms.title: Evaluation Forms
forms.no_questions: No questions yet. Use the panel on the left to add one.
forms.derived_intro: Combine question values into calculated scores (e.g. publications, teaching load).
forms.letter_grade_mapping: Letter grade mapping (same for all staff)
forms.derived_metrics_intro: Combine question values, assign a custom name, optional letter grades, and choose whether each metric appears on staff reports. Enable Grade by academic title to define grade bands per academic title (matched to each staff member's title).
periods.title: Evaluation Periods
reports.title: Reports
reports.no_evaluations_period: No evaluations yet for the selected period.
reports.derived_metrics_in_export: Derived score metrics are included in PDF and Excel export.
reports.category_score_help: Category score = average of question averages from evaluators who can see each question (shared questions are averaged across evaluators; private questions only from the assigned role).
reports.no_submitted_period: No submitted evaluations for this period.
reports.shared_help: Answered by multiple evaluators; the average is shown.
reports.private_help: Visible to a single evaluator role only.
reports.title_attr_academic: Set the staff member's Academic title on their profile to enable letter grades for title-based metrics.
reports.category_score_detail: Category score = average of :count scorable question(s) in this category (shared questions use the mean across evaluators; private questions use the single evaluator value).
org_roles.title: Organizational Roles
org_roles.intro: Assign Dean of College, Head of Department, and Quality Department Coordinator.
org_roles.import_hint: Staff imported with position Dean or Head of Department are assigned here automatically. Quality College Coordinators are managed on the Coordinators page.
org_roles.head: Head of Department
master_data.title: Master Data Import / Export
master_data.intro: Export or import colleges, departments, and staff field options as UTF-8 CSV files. Use exact column names from the templates.
master_data.colleges_columns: Columns: name_en, name_ku, code, description, is_active
master_data.departments_columns: Columns: college_name_en, name_en, name_ku, code, description, is_active
master_data.options_columns: Columns: category, name, color, is_active. Category: status, employee_type, qualification, academic_title, position
master_data.import_updates: Import updates existing rows when names match, and restores soft-deleted rows when applicable.
activity_log.title: Activity Log
messages.staff_purged: Permanently deleted :count staff member(s) and cleared related evaluation data.
messages.option_in_use: Cannot delete ":name" — it is assigned to :count staff member(s). Deactivate it instead.
messages.coordinator_restored: This user was previously removed and has been restored as a Quality College Coordinator. They can sign in via Google.
messages.coordinator_created: Quality College Coordinator created. They can sign in via Google.
messages.user_cannot_delete_self: You cannot delete your own account.
messages.super_admin_restored: This user was previously removed and has been restored as a Super Admin. They can sign in via Google.
messages.super_admin_created: Super Admin created. They can sign in via Google.
messages.super_admin_cannot_remove_self: You cannot remove your own Super Admin access.
messages.super_admin_min_one: At least one Super Admin must remain.
messages.evaluation_already_submitted: This evaluation is already submitted. Use Save changes to update answers.
messages.metric_select_questions: Select at least one question from this form.
messages.dean_wrong_college: Dean must belong to this college.
messages.committee_own_college_only: You can only create committees for your own college.
messages.committee_members_must_differ: Same-department and other-department members must be different people.
messages.committee_same_dept_required: The same-department member must belong to the chosen department.
messages.committee_local_exists: A local committee already exists for this department in this period.
messages.committee_local_no_head: Assign a Head of Department for this department before creating a local committee.
messages.committee_head_cannot_be_select: The Head of Department is added automatically and cannot be selected as another member.
messages.committee_hd_no_head: This department has no Head of Department assigned. Cannot build an HD committee.
messages.committee_hd_no_dean: The Dean of the College must be assigned before creating an HD committee.
messages.committee_head_is_evaluatee: The department head cannot be a committee member; they are the evaluatee.
messages.committee_hd_exists: An HD committee already exists for this department in this period.
messages.committee_staff_missing: A committee staff member record is missing.
messages.committee_user_create_failed: Could not create a user account for :name.
messages.staff_user_email_conflict: This email is already used by another user account. Choose a different email or contact the administrator.
messages.evaluation_locked: This evaluation has already been submitted.
messages.evaluation_admin_no_resubmit: Administrators cannot re-submit evaluations. Save your changes instead.
messages.evaluation_rating_range: Rating for question #:id must be between :min and :max.
messages.evaluation_numeric_required: A numeric value is required for: :text
